title: x-tra crispy shrimp indian crustaceans goan-style shrimp samosas
description: delight in the flavors of goa with these x-tra crispy samosas filled with succulent shrimp, perfect for a light and energizing meal.

ingredients.name: shrimp
ingredients.notes: fresh or frozen, peeled and deveined

instructions: mix together shrimp, cumin seeds, coriander powder, turmeric powder, red chili powder, and salt in a bowl.
heat ghee in a pan over medium heat.
add the shrimp mixture to the pan and cook until the shrimp are pink and cooked through.
meanwhile, make the pastry dough by mixing together flour, ghee, and water in a separate bowl.
divide the pastry dough into 8-10 equal pieces.
roll out each piece of dough into a thin circle.
place a tablespoon of the shrimp mixture in the center of each circle.
brush the edges of the pastry with ghee and fold the pastry over the filling to form a triangle.
brush the tops of the samosas with ghee and place them on a baking sheet.
bake the samosas in a preheated oven at 375f for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
garnish with mint leaves and serve hot.
